seo.title: Licensed Home Care Agency Maryland | MarkoCare
seo.description: MarkoCare is a Maryland RSA-licensed home care agency (COMAR 10.07.05). Learn about our mission, values, and commitment to dignified senior care across 4 counties.
seo.ogTitle: Licensed Home Care Agency Maryland | MarkoCare
seo.ogDescription: Learn about MarkoCare — Maryland's RSA-licensed home care agency. Our mission, caregivers, and commitment to dignified senior care across 4 counties.
seo.ogImageAlt: MarkoCare team members representing the Maryland home care agency's caregiving mission
keywords: Maryland RSA licensed home care agency
licensed home care agency background MD

hero.lead: MarkoCare is a Maryland Residential Service Agency built around one conviction: every family deserves home care they can genuinely trust — clinically supervised by a Registered Nurse and delivered by W2 employee caregivers.

trustMetrics.title: RN-Supervised Care
trustMetrics.desc: Every care plan developed, implemented, and monitored by a Registered Nurse

trustMetrics.title: W2 Employee Model
trustMetrics.desc: All caregivers are direct employees — fully insured and accountable

trustMetrics.title: Fully Insured & Bonded
trustMetrics.desc: Comprehensive liability and workers' compensation coverage

trustMetrics.title: 24/7 On-Call Support
trustMetrics.desc: Around-the-clock availability for urgent care needs

mission.blockquote: To enhance the quality of life for every client we serve by providing compassionate, dignified and skilled home care — empowering individuals to live safely and independently in the comfort of their own homes.
mission.lead: We witnessed firsthand how difficult it is to find home care that is both clinically sound and genuinely warm. MarkoCare was created to close that gap — with RN oversight, W2 employees, and a compassion-first culture that shows in every visit.

approachPillars.title: RN-Supervised Care
approachPillars.desc: Every care plan is created, implemented, and monitored by a Registered Nurse — not a coordinator without clinical credentials. This clinical backbone is non-negotiable.

approachPillars.title: W2 Employee Model
approachPillars.desc: Our caregivers are employees, not independent contractors. This means full insurance coverage, consistent accountability, and caregivers trained to MarkoCare standards.

approachPillars.title: Compassion-First Culture
approachPillars.desc: We hire for heart and train for excellence. We recruit caregivers who treat clients as family — and reinforce that standard through ongoing education, supervision, and recognition.

approach.subtitle: Three pillars drive everything we do — and everything that sets MarkoCare apart from agencies that treat care as a commodity.

rnSupervision.subtitle: Every client care plan is developed, implemented, and monitored by a Registered Nurse. This clinical backbone is non-negotiable.

steps.title: Initial RN Assessment
steps.desc: Our RN conducts a thorough in-home assessment to identify care needs, safety risks, and goals before services begin.

steps.title: Individualized Care Plan
steps.desc: A written care plan developed by the RN and shared with the client, family, and assigned caregiver.

steps.title: Supervisory Home Visits
steps.desc: The RN conducts regular supervisory visits to evaluate quality, update plans, and address emerging needs.

w2Model.lead: Many home care agencies classify caregivers as independent contractors to reduce their own costs. We chose a different path — because caring for our clients starts with caring for our team. Every MarkoCare caregiver is a W2 employee, because it protects you, your family, and the caregivers who dedicate themselves to your loved one's wellbeing.
benefits: Fully covered by our general liability and workers' compensation insurance
Consistent wages, schedules, and performance standards
No client exposure to independent-contractor liability gaps
Background-checked and trained to MarkoCare standards — not self-reported
Supervision and accountability built into every assignment

complianceCard.title: Insurance & Coverage Statement
complianceCard.body1: MarkoCare carries comprehensive general liability insurance and workers' compensation coverage for all W2 employees. Because our caregivers are employees — not independent contractors — our agency assumes full employer responsibility during all client assignments.
complianceCard.body2: We are actively working toward Medicaid provider enrollment with the Maryland Department of Health. In the meantime, we serve private-pay clients and assist families in exploring all available funding options including long-term care insurance.

hiringProcess.subtitle: Our multi-step vetting process ensures every caregiver who enters a client's home meets our high standards of professionalism, skill, and character.

steps.title: Initial Screening
steps.desc: Structured phone interview assessing experience, attitude, and availability.

steps.title: Background Check
steps.desc: State and federal criminal history, sex offender registry, and OIG exclusion list screening.

steps.title: Reference Verification
steps.desc: Prior employer and personal reference contacts to validate work history and character.

steps.title: Orientation & Training
steps.desc: Mandatory orientation covering client safety, infection control, and documentation.

steps.title: RN Competency Evaluation
steps.desc: Supervising RN evaluates caregiver competencies before their first client assignment.

steps.title: Ongoing Supervision
steps.desc: Regular RN supervisory visits and performance reviews ensure consistent quality of care.

localPresence.lead: Locally based in Columbia, MD, MarkoCare supports families across multiple counties — close enough to respond quickly, local enough to truly understand the communities we serve.

cta.title: Ready to Start Your Care Journey?
cta.lead: Get to know us the way we hope to know you — through an honest conversation about your loved one's needs. No pressure, no obligation, just real answers from people who genuinely want to help.
